description_long: This is a medium-sized juice bottle with a slightly tapered neck and a wide, rounded body. The bottle is primarily a yellow-orange color, suggesting it contains a fruit juice, and it features a green screw cap on top. The front label displays the brand name 'Simply Tropical' along with an illustration of sliced fruit, likely pineapple and mango, indicating the juice flavor. The bottle's surface appears matte and somewhat rough, with visible texturing and some wear or residue, especially near the neck and cap. The back of the bottle shows a blurred nutritional information panel, while the sides are mostly plain with subtle color variations. The overall appearance suggests a plastic construction, typical for single-serve juice bottles found in urban environments.
description: A yellow-orange plastic juice bottle with a green screw cap and a 'Simply Tropical' label featuring fruit illustrations. The bottle has a matte, slightly rough surface and a visible nutritional panel on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Simply Tropical' label and fruit illustration, with the green cap clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible label, showing the plain yellow-orange body and the green cap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a blurred nutritional information panel and the green cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain yellow-orange body with no label or panel, and the green cap.
